meaning: adj.生了外皮的,(酒)有沉淀的,陈年的,古老的
examples: He sat down to remove his mud-crusted boots.
Ice crusted the lake last night.
There are possible havens for life, such as the ice-crusted water world Europa.
Pretty slim margins for dishing out meat loaf and Jell-O (or rather, sesame-crusted tuna).
You come here for Gorgonzola-crusted, bone-in buffalo rib eye or red-wine-braised Montana lamb shank.
